creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Creating multiple ports from a single tarball is a headache that gets worse with every new Qt release.

While I can see the point of splitting qtbase, I'm not so sure about qtdeclarative, which basically generates qt-qml and qt-quick.

My hypothesis is that ports that depend on qt-qml also depend on the same other Qt5 ports that qt-quick depends on (or the increase in dependencies would be minimal).
